name: Kai-Den Kendo Spirit
name_jp: ケンドウ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魂</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>スピリット</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＫＡＩ－ＤＥＮ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>カイデン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
If a monster(s) is Pendulum Summoned: Return this card from the Pendulum Zone to the hand.

[ Monster Effect ] 
When this card is Normal Summoned: You can choose 1 card in your Pendulum Zone, and send to the GY all cards your opponent controls in the same column as that card. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card was Normal Summoned or flipped face-up this turn: Return this card to the hand.
pend_eff: If a monster(s) is Pendulum Summoned: Return this card from the Pendulum Zone to the hand.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can choose 1 card in your Pendulum Zone, and send to the GY all cards your opponent controls in the same column as that card. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card was Normal Summoned or flipped face-up this turn: Return this card to the hand.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can choose 1 card in your Pendulum Zone, and send to the GY all cards your opponent controls in the same column as that card. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card was Normal Summoned or flipped face-up this turn: Return this card to the hand.

action: Activates during the turn in which it was Normal Summoned
Returns itself from field to hand
Sends from your opponent's field to your opponent's Graveyard
